testimonials.name: Gavin Moyer
testimonials.quote: Group sessions contain challenging drills that improved my offensive mechanics and translated directly to in-game success.

testimonials.name: Timmy Moore
testimonials.quote: Chris challenged me, built immediate rapport, and improved my game and work ethic tremendously.

testimonials.name: Jaiden Giovannetti
testimonials.quote: Training includes ball handles and shot work. Coach is encouraging, wants the best, and pushes you to work hard.

testimonials.name: Allison Jung
testimonials.quote: Impressed with the feedback level Coach Chris provides — small tweaks that create big improvements in my son's game.

testimonials.name: Colton Rose
testimonials.quote: Chris pushed me in every workout and helped mold me into the player I am today.

testimonials.name: Aedan Walker
testimonials.quote: Coach recognizes your strengths and weaknesses, teaches skilled moves, and brings consistent high energy every session.

testimonials.name: Arkel Batts
testimonials.quote: His expertise improved my shooting, dribbling, and game understanding. His motivational guidance helped push me past my limits.

testimonials.name: Aleel Batts
testimonials.quote: Individualized instruction significantly improved my shooting, dribbling, and overall offensive ability.
